name: MCT Oil
summary: MCT Oil is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Mitochondrial Health; Metabolic Health; Energy Metabolism. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Metabolic Regulation; Lipid Metabolism Support, not treatment claims.
